automated_http_result: HTTP 403 for six registered health-professional fact sheets

official_index_observation.evidence_boundary: Search-index text is not a locally preserved authoritative source file and is not assigned a local SHA-256.

derived_text_capture.evidence_boundary: Supports reading and locator exploration only; does not prove preservation of NIH-served HTML or PDF bytes.

release_effect: No draft rule may be released using these sources until an authorized local copy, SHA-256, locator, and expert review are recorded.
human_action: A human may complete the Cloudflare verification in a normal browser and save each official page or PDF, then register hashes and locators.
